title: AI-UI Recursive Renderer with Action Handling
purpose: Recursively renders JSON UI definitions using registered components, handles action callbacks, and provides error fallbacks for invalid components or rendering errors.
module_context: Exports a recursive renderer component, a hook for rendering components, and utility functions for rendering multiple components or wrapping components with action handling.

steps.content: Initialize a ref for collecting form data from inputs.
Define a callback function to collect form data from select, input, and textarea elements.
Define a callback function to handle component actions, with error handling.
Validate that the component input is a valid object.
Extract component type, props, children, and actions from the input.
Validate that the component type is registered and retrieve the component.
IF the component is not found, render an unknown component fallback.
Recursively render child components if they exist.
Merge component props with global props and handle disabled state.
Render action buttons if present, attaching form data collection to their click handlers.
Render the component with its children and actions, handling any rendering errors with an error fallback.
IF the container ref is not set, return an empty data object.
Collect form data from select elements by name attribute.
Collect form data from input elements by name attribute, handling checkbox and radio types.
Collect form data from textarea elements by name attribute.
Return the collected form data.
IF an action callback is provided, invoke it with the action ID and payload.
IF the action callback throws an error, log the error to the console.

methods.name: useAIUIRenderer
methods.normalized_params: (): { renderComponent: (component: UIComponent, onAction?: ActionCallback, componentProps?: Record<string, any>) => React.ReactElement }

steps.content: Define a callback function to render a single component with action handling.
Return an object containing the renderComponent function.

methods.name: renderComponents
methods.normalized_params: (components: UIComponent[], onAction?: ActionCallback, componentProps?: Record<string, any>): React.ReactNode[]

steps.content: Map over the list of components to render each one.
For each component, create a renderer instance with the provided props and action callback.
Define a higher-order component that wraps the input component with AI-UI rendering capabilities.
Return a component that renders the wrapped component using the AI-UI renderer with the provided action callback.
